title: Pleasingly Dense Mexican Chwinamul Rajas Con Crema
description: A comforting and cultured Mexican dish featuring chwinamul, cooked in a clay pot with a low-fat friendly twist, served as rajas con crema. This dish is perfect for a chilly evening.

ingredients.name: chwinamul
ingredients.notes: also known as Korean aster or aster scaber

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roast the poblano peppers in the oven for 30 minutes, then peel and dice them.
Heat a clay pot over medium heat and saute the diced onions until they are translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the clay pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chwinamul to the clay pot and cook until it is tender, about 10 minutes.
Stir in the roasted poblano peppers, crema, queso fresco, cilantro, lime juice, salt, and black pepper.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the mixture for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serve the rajas con crema hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
